positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed graphic illustration featuring bioluminescent cosmic flora intertwined with minimalist geometric mandalas. The central composition showcases deep indigo nebulas forming crystalline structures around stylized glowing silver vines and fractal leaf patterns. Use a dramatic, high-contrast color palette of sapphire blue, vivid magenta, metallic silver, and emerald green. The style must be highly detailed graphic design, combining sacred geometry with ethereal cyberpunk botanical art. The overall look should be clean, suitable for screen printing, with strong, clear silhouettes and defined edges. Intricate, centralized composition, digital vector art, ultra quality, poster design.
